product.name: Search product boosts
product.description: List of search queries for which a product gets higher rank in search results

product.name: Related products
product.description: List of related products

product.name: Related products settings
product.description: Determines how related products are displayed along with algorithmic product recommendations

product.name: Complementary products
product.description: List of complementary products

product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Recommended age group
product.description: Identifies the suitable age range for a product, typically toys and games; e.g. babies, teens

product.name: Toy/Game material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in a toy or game, such as plastic or wood

product.name: Riding toy propulsion type
product.description: Identifies how a riding toy is propelled, such as electric or pedal

product.name: express delivery
product.description: Turn on for the products that have express delivery

product.name: Portability
product.description: Specifies the ease of moving or carrying a product, typically for breast pumps; e.g. portable, compact size

product.name: Infant age group
product.description: Classifies products suitable for specific infant age ranges, e.g. newborn, 0-6 months

product.name: Developmental features
product.description: Highlights the developmental benefits of a product, such as language development or emotional & social growth

product.name: Wheel type
product.description: Specifies the kind of wheel for cycling products, such as inflatable or solid

product.name: Features
product.description: Describes additional qualities or characteristics of a product, such as lightweight or foldable

product.name: Google: Custom Product
product.description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

product.name: Outdoor equipment features
product.description: Identifies unique traits of outdoor gear, such as weather resistant or portable

product.name: Board game mechanics
product.description: Describes the gameplay structure of a board game, such as strategy or cooperative

product.name: Gameplay skills
product.description: Identifies the skills enhanced by a game, like strategic thinking or memory

product.name: Board game features
product.description: Highlights unique aspects of a board game, e.g. quick set-up, expansion available

product.name: Reading toy type
product.description: Specifies the type of educational reading toy, e.g. spelling game, reading tablet

product.name: Game features
product.description: Highlights special characteristics of a game, for example, travel friendly or customizable

product.name: Dexterity skills
product.description: Identifies the specific dexterity skills required for a game, like balancing or precision

product.name: Construction set theme
product.description: Identifies the theme of a construction set, such as pirates or animals

product.name: Difficulty level
product.description: Indicates the complexity or challenge level of a puzzle or game, such as easy or expert

product.name: Puzzle theme
product.description: Describes the main subject or motif of a puzzle, such as animals or space

product.name: Theme
product.description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

product.name: Condition
product.description: Describes the state or quality of a product, e.g. mint (M), poor (P)

product.name: Puzzle type
product.description: Identifies the specific type of puzzle, such as 3D or brain teaser

product.name: Lumber/Wood type
product.description: Identifies the specific type of wood or lumber used in a product, like oak or pine

product.name: Shape
product.description: Describes the geometric form or shape of a product, such as round or heart

product.name: Finish
product.description: Describes the surface quality of a product, like satin or matte

product.name: Placement supported
product.description: Identifies where a product can be installed or used, e.g. wall, floor

product.name: Decoration material
product.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

product.name: Floor protection transparency level
product.description: Indicates how see-through the film or runner is, ranging from clear to opaque.

product.name: Genre
product.description: Classifies the category or style of media, such as horror or fantasy

product.name: Language version
product.description: Specifies the language version of a media product, such as ENG-US or ARA- Arabic

product.name: Target audience
product.description: Specifies who a product is suitable for, such as kids or all ages

product.name: Book cover type
product.description: Identifies the type of cover on a book, such as hardcover or paperback

product.name: Language
product.description: Specifies the language used or compatible language, e.g. English, multilingual

product.name: Material
product.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

product.name: Play vehicle propulsion
product.description: Identifies how a play vehicle is powered, such as by friction or remote control

product.name: Flash card theme
product.description: Specifies the learning theme of flash cards, such as alphabet or numbers

product.name: Wood finish
product.description: Describes the finishing treatment or construction method applied to wood products (e.g., solid wood, veneered, engineered, oiled, lacquered, painted)

product.name: Battery size
product.description: Indicates the battery compatibility for the product, such as AAA or 9V

product.name: Toy tool type
product.description: Identifies the type of toy tool in a pretend play set, like a drill or hammer

product.name: Power source
product.description: Specifies the power source a product uses to operate, such as solar or batteries

product.name: Battery type
product.description: Distinguishes between types of batteries, such as disposable or rechargeable

product.name: Product certifications & standards
product.description: Indicates the certifications or standards a product meets, such as organic or cruelty free

product.name: Motion
product.description: Defines the movement type of baby equipment, such as vibrating or bouncing

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 4
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 3
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 2
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 1
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Custom Label 0
variant.description: Label that you assign to a product to help organize bidding and reporting in Shopping campaigns.

variant.name: Google: Size System
variant.description: The country of the size system used by your product.

variant.name: Google: Gender
variant.description: The gender for which your product is intended.

variant.name: Google: Condition
variant.description: The condition of your product at time of sale.

variant.name: Google: Age Group
variant.description: The demographic for which your product is intended.

shop.name: Google: Show Store Widget App Embed Block
shop.description: Indicates if the store widget app embed block should be shown.
